name: Hanadi Ossman
ai_summary: Hanadi Ossman brings 5 years of childcare experience as an assistant director and teacher, working with children from infancy to age 12 in Tempe, AZ. She demonstrates strong conflict resolution skills and a genuine passion for child development, with flexible availability for both full-time and part-time roles.
